case_title: YOTAM SHMUELOV VS. CLAUDETTE R. DAVIS et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES -0- SERVED JUL-26-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, VINCENT R.
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CLAUDETTE R. DAVIS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF AUG-22-2013 AT 3:30 PM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2013 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHMUELOV, YOTAM
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-22-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-02-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. BOTH (2) DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHMUELOV, YOTAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIS, VINCENT R. $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,475.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CLAUDETTE R. DAVIS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $569.00 AGAINST THE JUDGMENT, AN AMOUNT WHICH HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID BY THE DEFENDANT TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY SHMUELOV, YOTAM AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, CLAUDETTE R. DAVIS, VINCENT R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-02-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
